step_rationale: Erythrocyte microparticles mark platelet adhesion and ongoing thrombotic activity.
mechanism: CD235a on erythrocyte-derived microparticles signals platelet activation and thrombus propagation during coronary occlusion.

references.title: Growing thrombi release increased levels of CD235a(+) microparticles and decreased levels of activated platelet-derived microparticles. Validation in ST-elevation myocardial infarction patients.
references.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
